code:
sequenceDiagram
    title Docker Security Implementation Sequence
    
    participant Client as Client
    participant Apache as Apache Container
    participant Crowdsec as Crowdsec Agent
    participant Firewall as Firewall Bouncer
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM Container
    participant DB as MariaDB Container
    participant DinD as Docker-in-Docker
    
    Note over Client, DinD: Network Security
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP/HTTPS Request
    
    %% Crowdsec Security Flow
    Apache->>Crowdsec: Log request for analysis
    Crowdsec->>Crowdsec: Parse and analyze logs
    
    alt Malicious Request Detected
        Crowdsec->>Firewall: Add client IP to blocklist
        Firewall->>Client: Block future requests
        Apache->>Client: Return 403 Forbidden
    else Request Allowed
        Apache->>PHP: Forward request via Unix socket
    end
    
    %% Container Isolation
    Note over Apache, DB: Container Security Isolation
    
    %% User permission security
    Apache->>Apache: Run as non-root user (Education_LMS_Portal)
    PHP->>PHP: Run as non-root user (Education_StudentDB)
    DB->>DB: Run with limited privileges
    
    %% Volume permissions
    Note over Apache, DB: Volume Security
    Apache->>Apache: Access socket with specific permissions
    PHP->>PHP: Access socket with specific permissions
    
    %% HTTPS communication
    Client->>Apache: HTTPS Request
    Apache->>Apache: SSL Termination with server.crt/key
    Apache->>PHP: Internal communication over Unix socket
    
    %% Security Headers
    PHP->>Apache: Response with generated content
    Apache->>Apache: Add security headers
    Apache->>Client: Response with security headers
    
    %% DinD Security
    Note over DinD: Docker-in-Docker Security
    DinD->>DinD: Run with privileged mode
    DinD->>DinD: SSH access with authentication

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育LMS系统画一个安全架构的时序图，重点展示从客户端请求到数据库的完整安全流程。首先要有Client、Apache Container、Crowdsec Agent这几个参与者，后面还要接PHP-FPM和MariaDB。
明白，Crowdsec Agent是负责安全检测的。那如果检测到恶意请求，需要展示阻断流程吗？还有，Firewall Bouncer是不是也要作为独立参与者？
对，Firewall Bouncer要单独列出来。检测到恶意请求时，Crowdsec通知Firewall Bouncer把客户端IP加入黑名单，然后Firewall Bouncer直接阻断后续请求。正常请求则通过Unix socket转发给PHP-FPM。
好的，我先把主流程画出来：Client发HTTPS请求到Apache，Apache把日志传给Crowdsec分析，然后用alt分支区分恶意请求和正常请求。另外，我们系统里还有Docker-in-Docker的部署场景，这个需要体现吗？
需要，DinD作为最后一个参与者。还有几个安全细节要补充：Apache和PHP-FPM都要以non-root用户运行，分别对应Education_LMS_Portal和Education_StudentDB这两个服务账号；MariaDB也要限制权限。
收到。那DinD的安全配置怎么展示？它是privileged模式运行的，还有SSH认证访问。
对，DinD那里加个Note说明privileged模式和SSH认证。另外Apache到PHP-FPM的内部通信要走Unix socket，不是TCP；Apache还要做SSL终止，最后响应要加上安全头。
都加上了。现在图里有这几个Note区域：Network Security覆盖整个请求链路，Container Security Isolation标注在Apache到DB之间，还有Volume Security说明socket权限，最后DinD的独立安全说明。
等等，Apache和PHP-FPM之间的socket访问权限要单独标注一下，你写的是"Access socket with specific permissions"，但最好明确这是双向的——Apache通过socket转发请求，PHP-FPM通过socket返回响应。
明白了，我调整一下：Apache→PHP是"Forward request via Unix socket"，PHP→Apache是"Response with generated content"，然后Apache加上安全头再返回给Client。这样流程就完整了。
完美。最后确认一下标题用"Docker Security Implementation Sequence"，所有参与者标签要清晰，特别是Crowdsec和Firewall Bouncer的联动逻辑要一目了然。
